## Summary

- Describe the change in one or two concrete bullets.

## Scope

- Affected crates/components:
- User-visible change:
- IPC/events/bindings changed: yes/no

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check`
- [ ] `cargo check --workspace`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`
- [ ] UI workflow verified manually, if applicable

## Screenshots or Recording

Add before/after media for visible UI changes.

## Notes

Mention risks, follow-up work, or intentionally deferred behavior.
